svg.title: Onboarding workflow architecture diagram v2
svg.desc: Structural architecture diagram with a visible trigger arrow from group assignment into Power Automate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a group assignment trigger in Power Automate and how does it fire?')
sendPrompt('How does Power Automate coordinate all services in this onboarding workflow?')
sendPrompt('What role does Microsoft Entra play in the onboarding workflow?')
sendPrompt('How does the Office 365 Users connector provide profile data?')
sendPrompt('How does SharePoint serve onboarding documents to the workflow?')
sendPrompt('How does Outlook deliver the welcome email to new employees?')
